name: Game Boy (DMG)
source: Original Game Boy (DMG-01) 4-shade green LCD palette — widely cited reference values
notes: 4 shades only — the discipline is in value placement, not color. One ramp; everything (skin, metal, cloth) is rendered with the same 4 steps, distinguished by texture and shape. Excellent for practicing readability under extreme constraint. For the modern grey Game Boy Pocket look, substitute #FFFFFF/#A8A8A8/#545454/#000000.
